must_do: Work only on group 8d9d8e44-54b2-4279-aab2-0a6d9ce851b2 with slug news-test.

Install a real executable news workflow baseline whose initial stage is cycle_task_plan and whose stage chain covers at least: cycle_task_plan, material.collect, material.review, draft.compose, draft.proofread, draft.revise, draft.recheck, publish.decision, report.publish, product.test, product.benchmark, product.cross_cycle_compare, product.report, retrospective.plan, retrospective.discussion, retrospective.summary, agent.optimization, agent.self_optimize.

Declare explicit cycle identity fields for later validation. cycle_no and cycle_id must have an authoritative location in session/protocol/state and must be expected in workflow artifacts or message metadata so branch B can filter real cycle 1 vs cycle 2 content later.

Return strict JSON only with authoritative readback facts after patch: protocol_id, workflow_id, execution_spec_id, current_stage, gate_snapshot.current_stage or equivalent, stage_order, and where cycle identity surfaces.
